attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME AS BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME,
NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT AS BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID) AS BK_CARTON_ID,
SSSED.REQUESTED_DATE AS BK_REQUESTED_DTM ,
'N' as WITH_INBOUND_ROLE,
SSSED.CREATION_DATE AS CREATION_DTM ,
 cast('1900-01-01 00:00:00' as timestamp(0)) as RU_BK_INBOUND_RESPONSE_DTM,
CAST(SSSED.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CREATION_DT,
SSSED.AGE_BUCKET AS AGE_BUCKET_CNT,
CAST(SSSED.REQUESTED_DATE  AS DATE ) AS  DV_REQUESTED_DT,
SSSED.CYCLE_COUNT_ID AS SK_CYCLE_ID_INT_CNT,
SSSED.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID_INT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NSCIO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL  AND NSCIO.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME IS NOT NULL AND NSCIO.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT IS NOT NULL AND NSCIO.BK_CARTON_ID  IS NOT NULL AND
 NSCIO.BK_REQUESTED_DTM IS NOT NULL THEN  'U' ELSE 'I' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
CYCLE_COUNT_ID,
SLC_SITE_NAME,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
ORDER_NUMBER,
HANDLING_UNIT_ID,
REQUESTED_DATE,
CREATION_DATE,
AGE_BUCKET,
MESSAGE_ID
from 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE
union 
SELECT 
CYCLE_COUNT_ID,
SLC_SITE_NAME,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
ORDER_NUMBER,
HANDLING_UNIT_ID,
REQUESTED_DATE,
CREATION_DATE,
AGE_BUCKET,
MESSAGE_ID
from 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
)SSSED
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SSSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC
ON trim(SSSED.HANDLING_UNIT_ID)=trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID)
INNER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER NSLC
ON NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME =SSSED.SLC_SITE_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SLC_SITE_CNTNR_INV_OUTBOUND NSCIO
ON NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME=NSCIO.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME
AND NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT=NSCIO.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT
AND trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID)=trim(NSCIO.BK_CARTON_ID)
AND SSSED.REQUESTED_DATE=NSCIO.BK_REQUESTED_DTM
AND NSCIO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT STG.MESSAGE_ID, STG.CYCLE_COUNT_ID, STG.ORGANIZATION_NAME, STG.ORDER_NUMBER, STG.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG.SLC_SITE_NAME, STG.REQUESTED_DATE, 
STG.AGE_BUCKET, STG.PERCENT_EVALUATION, STG.SELECTED_ORDER_SHIPSET, STG.MESSAGE_STATUS, STG.HANDLING_UNIT_ID, STG.RANDOM_NUMBER, STG.PART_DUNS_NUMBER,
 STG.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER, STG.RETRY_COUNT, STG.CREATED_BY, STG.CREATION_DATE, STG.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG.ATTRIBUTE1, STG.ATTRIBUTE2, 
 STG.ATTRIBUTE3, STG.ATTRIBUTE4, STG.ATTRIBUTE5, STG.ATTRIBUTE6, STG.ATTRIBUTE7, STG.ATTRIBUTE8, STG.ATTRIBUTE9, STG.ATTRIBUTE10, STG.ATTRIBUTE11,
 STG.ATTRIBUTE12, STG.ATTRIBUTE13, STG.ATTRIBUTE14, STG.ATTRIBUTE15,  STG.GLOBAL_NAME, 
STG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
STG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
STG.REFRESH_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_4C1_OB_IFACE STG
 WHERE
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS,N_SALES_ORDER NSO
WHERE  STG.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND STG.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC
WHERE trim(STG.HANDLING_UNIT_ID)=trim(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID)  )
OR NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER NSLC
WHERE NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME =STG.SLC_SITE_NAME)
